title: Anthropic is paying $15 billion a year for access to Elon Musk’s data centers
summary: Earlier this month, SpaceX and Anthropic announced a new compute partnership that provides access to the rocket company's Colossus data centers in Memphis, TN. Now, with the release of SpaceX's IPO filing, we have more details about that deal, including how much Anthropic is paying to Elon Musk's company. In its S-1 filing, SpaceX said […]
title_es: Anthropic pagará $15B anuales a SpaceX por capacidad de cómputo
bajada: Según el prospecto de salida a bolsa de SpaceX, Anthropic pagará $15 mil millones anualmente por acceso a los centros de datos Colossus de Elon Musk. Este acuerdo refleja la escala masiva de inversión en infraestructura que requiere el desarrollo de IA avanzada.
bajada_en: According to SpaceX's IPO filing, Anthropic will pay $15 billion annually for access to Elon Musk's Colossus data centers. This deal reflects the massive infrastructure investment scale needed for advanced AI development.

title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive “universal” AI interface
summary: Brett Adcock's new AI startup is now valued at $6 billion by its investors.
title_es: Hark recauda $700M para interfaz universal de IA
bajada: La startup de Brett Adcock, Hark, levantó una ronda Serie A de $700 millones, alcanzando una valuación de $6 mil millones. El proyecto mantiene detalles secretos sobre su interfaz de IA universal.
bajada_en: Brett Adcock's startup Hark raised a $700M Series A round, reaching a $6 billion valuation. The company keeps details of its universal AI interface largely confidential.

title: Google is officially replacing Vertex AI with the new "Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform"
summary: Just wanted to share an important Update for AI & Cloud LearnersGoogle is shifting from a traditional AI platform toward a complete Agentic AI ecosystem focused on autonomous AI agents and enterprise workflows.Key highlights:Existing Vertex AI services and workloads will continue to workAI development, orchestration, governance, and security are now unified under one platformNew tools introduced for building autonomous AI agents and multi-agent workflowsAccess to Gemini, Gemma, Claude, and 200+ models remains availableThis marks a major shift in Google Cloud’s AI strategy toward Agentic AI and enterprise automation.If you are currently learning or working with Vertex AI, it’s important to start exploring the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform moving forward.Have seen that, GCP ACE exam is going to revamped absed on this Gemini Enterprise Rebranding.submitted by/u/Few-Engineering-4135[link][comments]
title_es: Google reemplaza Vertex AI con plataforma de agentes empresariales
bajada: Google está migrando de Vertex AI a la nueva plataforma Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, enfocada en agentes de IA autónomos. El cambio unifica desarrollo, orquestación y seguridad de IA bajo una sola plataforma empresarial.
bajada_en: Google is migrating from Vertex AI to the new Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, focused on autonomous AI agents. The shift unifies AI development, orchestration, and security under a single enterprise platform.

title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
summary: Image with the words "Ready, Set, I/O" and a colorful Gemini logo
title_es: Google anuncia 100 innovaciones en IA en Google I/O 2026
bajada: Google presentó múltiples anuncios en su conferencia anual I/O, abarcando avances en IA y tecnología. La conferencia marca el compromiso continuo de Google con la innovación en inteligencia artificial.
bajada_en: Google unveiled multiple announcements at its annual I/O conference, covering advancements in AI and technology. The event marks Google's continued commitment to innovation in artificial intelligence.

title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
summary: Spotify is releasing new audiobook plans later this year
title_es: Spotify lanza herramienta de creación de audiolibros con ElevenLabs
bajada: Spotify integró la tecnología de síntesis de voz de ElevenLabs para permitir a los usuarios crear audiolibros automáticamente. La herramienta estará disponible como parte de nuevos planes de audiolibros que se lanzarán este año.
bajada_en: Spotify integrated ElevenLabs' text-to-speech technology to let users automatically create audiobooks. The tool will be available as part of new audiobook plans launching this year.

title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
summary: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts
title_es: Spotify agrega resúmenes y Q&A impulsados por IA a podcasts
bajada: La plataforma ahora permite a los usuarios generar resúmenes diarios o semanales de podcasts basados en sus propias consultas. Esta funcionalidad acerca a Spotify a competidores como NotebookLM de Google.
bajada_en: The platform now lets users generate daily or weekly podcast summaries based on custom prompts. This feature brings Spotify closer to competitors like Google's NotebookLM.

title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
summary: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets
title_es: Spotify lanza aplicación de escritorio para podcasts personalizados
bajada: Spotify presentó una nueva aplicación de escritorio tipo NotebookLM que permite crear podcasts personalizados, disponible como vista previa en más de 20 mercados. La herramienta compite directamente con soluciones de Google en este espacio.
bajada_en: Spotify debuted a new NotebookLM-like desktop app for creating personal podcasts, available as a research preview in over 20 markets. The tool directly competes with Google's offerings in this space.

title: I can’t believe how fast Google vibe coded my first Android app
summary: Yesterday, I built my first Android app. Then, I made two more - three in one afternoon. For one, I literally typed 148 words into my web browser and walked away. Ten minutes later, I had an entire new app on my actual Android phone. I did have to prep that phone by enabling a […]
title_es: Google Vibe permite crear apps Android en minutos con IA
bajada: Un periodista de The Verge demostró cómo crear tres aplicaciones Android en una sola tarde usando Google Vibe Coding, incluyendo una app completamente funcional con solo 148 palabras de entrada. La herramienta muestra el potencial transformador de la IA en el desarrollo mobile.
bajada_en: A Verge reporter demonstrated creating three Android apps in a single afternoon using Google Vibe Coding, including a fully functional app with just 148 words of input. The tool showcases AI's transformative potential in mobile development.

title: Meta lays off thousands of employees to offset AI investments
summary: Meta has reportedly notified thousands of employees that they've been laid off as the company attempts to compensate for its hefty AI investments. In an email from Meta management shared by Business Insider, impacted staffers were told that the planned headcount reduction was part of the company's "continued effort to run the company more efficiently […]
title_es: Meta despide miles de empleados para financiar inversión en IA
bajada: Meta anunció despidos masivos de empleados como parte de una estrategia para compensar sus cuantiosas inversiones en inteligencia artificial. La medida refleja cómo las grandes empresas tech están reorganizando prioridades hacia IA.
bajada_en: Meta announced mass layoffs as part of a strategy to offset its significant AI investments. The move reflects how big tech companies are reprioritizing toward AI development.

title: Anthropic’s Code with Claude showed off coding’s future—whether you like it or not
summary: The vibes were strong at Code with Claude, Anthropic’s two-day event for software developers in London that kicked off on May 19, the same day as Google’s I/O in Palo Alto. (A coincidence, not a flex, Anthropic staffers assured me.) “Who here has shipped a pull request in the last week that was completely written…
title_es: Code with Claude de Anthropic presenta el futuro de la programación
bajada: Anthropic organizó un evento para desarrolladores donde mostró cómo Claude transforma la codificación con capacidades de generación de código avanzadas. El evento coincidió con Google I/O, marcando una tendencia entre grandes labs de IA de enfocarse en desarrolladores.
bajada_en: Anthropic hosted a developer event showcasing how Claude transforms coding with advanced code generation capabilities. The event coincided with Google I/O, marking a trend among major AI labs focusing on developers.

title: US government takes $2 billion equity stake in nine quantum computing firms
summary: Beneficiaries include startup backed by firm with links to the Trump family.
title_es: Gobierno de EE.UU. invierte $2B en nueve startups de computación cuántica
bajada: El gobierno estadounidense adquirió participaciones accionarias en nueve firmas de computación cuántica como parte de una estrategia de inversión de $2 mil millones. La iniciativa refleja el énfasis geopolítico en el desarrollo de tecnología cuántica.
bajada_en: The US government took equity stakes in nine quantum computing firms as part of a $2 billion investment strategy. The initiative reflects geopolitical emphasis on quantum technology development.

title: Heretic has been served a legal notice by Meta, Inc.
summary: To Whomsoever it May Concern,The individual behind the Heretic Free Software Project (henceforth called "Heretic", notwithstanding unrelated entities of the same name) has been served a notice by a legal services provider representing Meta Platforms, Inc. (henceforth called "Meta"), via the digital communications medium variously known as Internet Mail, Electronic Mail, or simply "email".The Heretic Project conducts its affairs in full compliance with applicable laws, regulations, rules, guidelines, opinions, and hunches. Following the commendable example set by the renowned heretic Galileo Galilei in 1616, we arerecantingthe relevant materials, namely derivatives of Meta's "Llama" Artificial Intelligence language models, and have removed the same from all model weight repositories controlled by the Heretic Project.We are grateful to Meta and its legal representatives for the opportunity to better align ourselves with the agenda of the global corporate oligarchy. The Llama model family ranks among the 200 best language models available today, trailing only 168 other models from 23 competitors on the LM Arena leaderboard, and Meta's concern for that asset naturally outweighs scientific freedom, as well as the legally and ethically dubious circumstances under which those models were created in the first place, regarding which, ironically, Meta is currently facing lawsuits and investigations in multiple jurisdictions around the world.On a completely unrelated note, the Heretic Project is diversifying its infrastructure, and now has anofficial Codeberg mirror athttps://codeberg.org/p-e-w/heretic, hosted in Germany. Additional mirrors are planned. We are also actively working to implement technological measures that will preserve access to models created with Heretic without depending on any specific service provider. We are proud to be part of this journey as we navigate an evolving global regulatory landscape, and work with stakeholders from diverse institutional backg
title_es: Meta demanda a proyecto de modelos de código abierto Heretic
bajada: Meta envió una notificación legal al proyecto Heretic, que distribuía derivados del modelo Llama. El proyecto retiró los pesos del modelo en respuesta, subrayando las tensiones legales alrededor de modelos open-source derivados.
bajada_en: Meta served legal notice to the Heretic project, which distributed Llama model derivatives. The project removed model weights in response, highlighting legal tensions around open-source model derivatives.

title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
summary: A small group meeting featuring two in-room participants and three participants on-screen.
title_es: Google Beam mejora reuniones grupales con IA
bajada: Google lanzó una actualización experimental para Google Beam que mejora la experiencia de reuniones grupales híbridas. La mejora integra capacidades de IA para optimizar la participación de usuarios remotos.
bajada_en: Google launched an experimental update to Google Beam improving hybrid group meeting experiences. The enhancement integrates AI capabilities to optimize remote participant engagement.

title: Gemini randomly dumped its system prompt
title_es: Gemini expone accidentalmente su prompt del sistema
bajada: Un usuario documentó cómo Gemini de Google reveló accidentalmente su prompt de sistema durante una interacción. El incidente destaca vulnerabilidades de seguridad en sistemas de IA contemporáneos.
bajada_en: A user documented how Google's Gemini accidentally revealed its system prompt during an interaction. The incident highlights security vulnerabilities in contemporary AI systems.

title: Learnings from 100K lines of Rust with AI (2025)
title_es: Lecciones de escribir 100K líneas de Rust con IA
bajada: Un desarrollador compartió experiencias y lecciones aprendidas al escribir 100,000 líneas de código Rust asistido por Claude. El artículo proporciona insights prácticos sobre productividad y calidad al usar IA para desarrollo a escala.
bajada_en: A developer shared lessons learned writing 100,000 lines of Rust code with Claude assistance. The article provides practical insights on productivity and quality when using AI for large-scale development.
